quality.description_clarity: High. The spell's effect (creating lights) and limitations (concentration, movement, grouping) are clearly stated.
quality.flavor: Good. The name and visual effect align well with the mechanics.

action_economy.subsequent_actions: 1 bonus action per turn for movement

range_and_area.grouping_constraint: Lights must remain within 20 feet of each other.

resource_cost.material_component: Present and minor ('a bit of phosphorus or wychwood, or a glowworm')

mechanics.power_scaling_vs_level: Appropriate for a 0-level (Cantrip) spell; utility-focused rather than damaging.

recommendations.data_completeness: Complete for standard SRD/5e spell data.
recommendations.potential_clarification: None needed; mechanics are standard for this cantrip.
